summary: Tested contextual quick replies and duplicate removal fixes. CONFIRMED: (1) Quick replies now only appear in header bar (body chips = 0), (2) Backend has sweet/savoury pattern matching implemented correctly, (3) Contextual quick replies match questions being asked. Fix applied to ChatMessage.jsx to disable body quick reply chips.
action_items: IMPORTANT: The sweet/savoury contextual quick replies depend on Mira's AI response including 'sweet-style' or 'savoury-style' text. The backend pattern matching is working correctly (tested via Python), but the AI conversation flow may not always reach that specific question based on user choices.
critical_code_review_comments: Fix Applied: ChatMessage.jsx lines 1133-1149 - Commented out QuickReplyChips rendering in message body. Quick replies now only show in header (MiraMessageHeader via msg.quickReplies).

Backend Pattern: mira_routes.py lines 11555-11561 - Pattern 9 correctly matches 'sweet-style', 'savoury-style', 'sweet style', 'savoury style', 'sweet or savoury', 'fruity or meaty' and returns ['Sweet-style', 'Savoury-style', 'Surprise me', 'Tell me more']

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Duplicate quick replies removed, header-only display working

seed_data_creation: N/A - Used existing test user and pet (Lola)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 226 verified: (1) NO DUPLICATE QUICK REPLIES - Body chips count = 0 after fix in ChatMessage.jsx. Quick replies now only appear in the header bar next to 'Mira' name. (2) CONTEXTUAL QUICK REPLIES - The conversation flow shows appropriate options like 'At home', 'Pet café' for location question, 'Just us', 'Small (under 6)' for party size, etc. (3) BACKEND SWEET/SAVOURY PATTERN - Pattern in generate_intelligent_quick_replies() tested and confirmed working. The AI response must include 'sweet-style or savoury-style' text for this pattern to trigger.

examples_verified: Location question: At home, Pet café, Garden/outdoor, Hotel staycation, Not sure yet
Party size question: Just us, Small (under 6), Medium (6-12), Big party, Not sure yet
Arrangement question: Custom cake, Photographer, Party setup, Open request
Birthday purpose question: Yes Lola's birthday!, Gotcha day celebration, Just want to spoil them, Something else

backend_sweet_savoury_pattern.test_result: Pattern matches 'sweet-style or savoury-style' text and returns ['Sweet-style', 'Savoury-style', 'Surprise me', 'Tell me more']
backend_sweet_savoury_pattern.note: Depends on AI response including the specific trigger text
